# JailGuard

> JailGuard is a pure-Rust prompt-injection detector with a 1.5 MB
> embedded ONNX classifier. 98.40% accuracy on a 7,049-sample held-out
> test set, p50 14 ms CPU inference on Apple M3, 8-class attack
> taxonomy. Bindings for Rust, Python, JavaScript, and Go. Dual-licensed
> Apache-2.0 OR MIT.

## Quickstart

- [Rust](https://github.com/yfedoseev/jailguard/blob/main/docs/GETTING_STARTED.md): `cargo add jailguard` — three functions: `detect()`, `is_injection()`, `score()`.
- [Python](https://github.com/yfedoseev/jailguard/blob/main/python/README.md): `pip install jailguard` — same surface via pyo3 + maturin.
- [JavaScript / TypeScript](https://github.com/yfedoseev/jailguard/blob/main/js/README.md): `npm install @jailguard/jailguard` — prebuilt napi addons ship in the tarball, no Rust toolchain needed.
- [Go](https://github.com/yfedoseev/jailguard/blob/main/go/README.md): `go get github.com/yfedoseev/jailguard/go` then `go run github.com/yfedoseev/jailguard/go/cmd/install@latest` — CGo + purego backends.

## Reference

- [API reference](https://github.com/yfedoseev/jailguard/blob/main/docs/API.md): full function signatures, error codes, `RiskLevel` enum, `DetectionOutput` struct.
- [Architecture](https://github.com/yfedoseev/jailguard/blob/main/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md): MiniLM-L6-v2 embedder → 130K-parameter MLP → 8-class output.
- [Integration guide](https://github.com/yfedoseev/jailguard/blob/main/docs/INTEGRATION_GUIDE.md): wrapping LLM calls, middleware patterns, threshold tuning.

## Benchmarks

- [BENCHMARKS.md](https://github.com/yfedoseev/jailguard/blob/main/BENCHMARKS.md): methodology, dataset composition (17 public HF datasets, 70,479 normalized samples), per-platform latencies, head-to-head vs `protectai/deberta-v3-base-prompt-injection-v2`, `deepset/deberta-v3-base-injection`, and `madhurjindal/Jailbreak-Detector-Large`.

## Agent guidance

- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/yfedoseev/jailguard/blob/main/AGENTS.md): build/test commands, project structure, code style, feature flags, release flow. Linux Foundation AGENTS.md spec.

## Optional

- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/yfedoseev/jailguard/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): release notes in Keep-a-Changelog format.
- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/yfedoseev/jailguard/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): development setup, lint rules, PR guidelines.
- [SECURITY](https://github.com/yfedoseev/jailguard/blob/main/SECURITY.md): vulnerability reporting, response SLA.
- [CITATION.cff](https://github.com/yfedoseev/jailguard/blob/main/CITATION.cff): citation metadata.
